tools.name: search_hfa_content
tools.description: Search a dated snapshot of recent public Hedge Fund Alpha article metadata. Returns titles and links, never article bodies or subscriber content.

tools.name: get_hfa_article
tools.description: Resolve an apex Hedge Fund Alpha article URL within the dated recent-content snapshot to public metadata only.

tools.name: list_recent_hfa_content
tools.description: List recently published metadata from the dated snapshot for an allowlisted public editorial type.

tools.name: get_hfa_offerings
tools.description: Return official Hedge Fund Alpha membership, data, and licensing pages without making price or availability claims.

tools.name: search_catalog
tools.description: Search verified Hedge Fund Alpha membership products and prices using the UCP catalog search capability. Read-only; cannot create a checkout or charge a payment method.

tools.name: lookup_catalog
tools.description: Look up one or more verified Hedge Fund Alpha membership products or variants by UCP identifier. Read-only; cannot create a checkout or charge a payment method.

tools.name: get_product
tools.description: Get verified detail for one Hedge Fund Alpha membership product or variant using UCP catalog lookup. Read-only; human checkout remains required.
